Uses of Class
com.nib.commons.io.vsam.Rrn

Packages that use Rrn
Package
Description
com.nib.commons.io.vsam
Provides classes and interfaces for emulating VSAM (Virtual Storage Access Method) file organizations.
com.nib.supernaut
Core implementation of the Supernaut online transaction processing (OLTP) region.
com.nib.supernaut.commands
CICS-like commands API classes.
com.nib.supernaut.files
File control and access management for Supernaut.

    Methods in com.nib.supernaut with parameters of type Rrn
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.deleteFile(String sysid, String file, Rrn rrn, boolean generic, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Deletes a file record using the specified record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.readFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, Rrn rrn, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Reads data from a file into the specified byte array using a record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.readNextFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, Rrn rrn, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Reads the next record in a file using the record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.readPrevFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] into, int intoOffset, int intoLength, Rrn rrn, boolean update, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Reads the previous record in a file using the record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.resetbrFile(String sysid, String file, Rrn rrn, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Resets the browse operation on a file using the record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.startbrFile(String sysid, String file, Rrn rrn, boolean equal, boolean generic, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Starts browsing records in a file using the record reference number (RRN).
    CommandResponse
    SupernautContext.writeFile(String sysid, String file, byte[] from, int fromOffset, int fromLength, Rrn rrn, boolean nohandle, IntegerVariable respVar, IntegerVariable resp2Var)
    Writes data to a file from the specified byte array using a record reference number (RRN).
